title: athyrium retusum
intro: Athyrium retusum, also known as the toothed lady fern, is a species of fern native to China and Japan, characterized by its toothed or lobed fronds. The medicinal properties of Athyrium retusum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Athyrium retusum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in infusions or dried and consumed as a capsule or powder.
